title: ADHD-Dev CLI Tool (Plan B)
description: CLI-integrated focus tool for ADHD developers using Daemon + CLI + Claude Code Hooks architecture

stories.title: Project scaffolding and CLI shell
acceptanceCriteria: package.json exists with name 'adhd-dev', type 'module', bin field pointing to dist/cli/index.js
tsconfig.json configured for ESM with strict mode
tsup.config.ts configured to bundle src/cli/index.ts
src/cli/index.ts uses commander with subcommands: status, where, timer, today, flow, dash, daemon, go, doctor, config, init, reset, install-hooks, uninstall-hooks
src/core/paths.ts exports ADHD_DEV_HOME (~/.adhd-dev), CLAUDE_HOME (~/.claude), and sub-paths
src/core/config.ts creates ~/.adhd-dev/ and config.json on first access with sensible defaults
src/core/logger.ts provides structured logging (error/warn/info/debug) to ~/.adhd-dev/logs/
Running 'npx tsx src/cli/index.ts status' outputs 'No active sessions' and creates ~/.adhd-dev/config.json
TypeScript compiles with zero errors (npx tsc --noEmit)

stories.title: Claude session discovery and .jsonl parser
acceptanceCriteria: src/services/path-encoder.ts: encodePath('/Users/hona.mind/Dev/playground/adhd-dev') returns '-Users-hona-mind-Dev-playground-adhd-dev' (replaces / and . with -)
src/services/path-encoder.ts: includes directory scan fallback when primary encoding fails to match
src/services/claude-session-discovery.ts: reads ~/.claude/sessions/PID.json, extracts {pid, sessionId, cwd, startedAt}
src/services/claude-session-discovery.ts: joins PID→sessionId→encoded-cwd→UUID.jsonl correctly
src/services/claude-session-discovery.ts: determines session state (active/idle/stale/orphan) based on PID alive + .jsonl recency
src/services/claude-session-parser.ts: parses .jsonl and extracts last N human/assistant exchanges
src/services/claude-session-parser.ts: handles corrupted/empty .jsonl without crashing
Unit tests pass using tests/fixtures/mock-claude-home/ (not real ~/.claude/)
'adhd where' lists active sessions with last exchange summary
TypeScript compiles with zero errors

stories.title: Focus timer engine with basic dopamine signals
acceptanceCriteria: src/services/timer-engine.ts: supports start(minutes), stop(), status(), preset(name)
Timer uses Date-based absolute time comparison (sleep-safe), not setInterval ticks
Timer state persisted to ~/.adhd-dev/timer-state.json (survives process restart)
Presets available: pomodoro (25/5), desktime (52/17), ultradian (90/20)
src/services/flow-protection.ts: flow mode suppresses timer notifications when active
src/services/stats-aggregator.ts: tracks daily focus time and completed session count
src/services/notification.ts: sends terminal bell (\a) + node-notifier system notification on timer complete
'adhd timer start 1' starts a 1-minute timer; 'adhd timer status' shows remaining time
'adhd flow on' enables flow mode; 'adhd flow off' disables it
'adhd today' shows today's focus time and session count
Unit tests for timer engine, flow protection, and stats aggregator pass
TypeScript compiles with zero errors

stories.title: Daemon process with IPC and DopamineService
acceptanceCriteria: src/daemon/index.ts: forks as background process, writes PID to ~/.adhd-dev/adhd-dev.pid
src/daemon/ipc-server.ts: creates Unix domain socket at ~/.adhd-dev/adhd-dev.sock
CLI client communicates with daemon via socket; falls back to file-based reads when daemon is down
src/daemon/file-watcher.ts: watches ~/.claude/sessions/ and ~/.claude/projects/ via chokidar
New Claude session detected within 5 seconds of creation
src/services/dopamine-service.ts: DopamineService with AdaptiveEngine + SignalEmitter
AdaptiveEngine: collects 7-day baseline, adjusts signal frequency/intensity via rules (not ML)
SignalEmitter: max 1 prominent signal per 5 min, 3 consecutive ignores → quiet mode
Ethical boundaries hardcoded: no streaks, no loss framing, no comparison, no 'wasted X min'
DopamineService writes prompt-state.json with pulse/badge/timer/timeOfDay/returnTo/warmth fields
'adhd daemon start' starts daemon; 'adhd daemon stop' stops it; 'adhd daemon status' shows state
Stale PID/socket detection and cleanup on daemon start
Data purge runs daily: removes records older than 30 days
TypeScript compiles with zero errors

stories.title: Shell prompt, tmux integration, and TUI dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: src/cli/commands/prompt-status.ts: reads prompt-state.json and outputs ANSI-formatted string
prompt-status execution time < 50ms (file read only, no daemon IPC needed)
prompt-status returns empty string when daemon is not running (graceful degradation)
src/cli/commands/tmux-status.ts: outputs richer status for tmux status-right
src/tui/App.tsx: ink-based TUI dashboard with SessionList, TimerWidget, StatsBar, ContextCard, DopamineBar
TUI shows Context Warmth colors: warm(yellow) <5min, medium(white) <30min, cool(gray) >1h
TUI keybindings: q=quit, t=timer toggle, w=where detail, g=go to session, r=refresh
'adhd dash' launches TUI dashboard with live data
TypeScript compiles with zero errors

stories.title: Claude Code hooks and adhd init --full onboarding
acceptanceCriteria: hooks/session-start.sh: lightweight shell script (~5ms) that sends JSON to Unix socket via nc
hooks/session-start.sh: falls back to appending to ~/.adhd-dev/events.jsonl when daemon is down
src/services/hook-installer.ts: atomic write (temp file + rename) for settings.json modification
src/services/hook-installer.ts: keeps 3 backup versions of settings.json
'adhd install-hooks' adds hooks to ~/.claude/settings.json; 'adhd uninstall-hooks' restores from backup
src/services/shell-integrator.ts: detects current shell (zsh/bash) and adds prompt integration
Shell wrapper 'adhd() { eval "$(command adhd-dev "$@")" }' installed for adhd go support
'adhd init --full' completes all setup in one command: init + hooks + daemon + prompt + doctor
'adhd doctor' reports status of all components (daemon, hooks, prompt, db, sessions)
'adhd reset' removes all data, hooks, and prompt integration cleanly
TypeScript compiles with zero errors

stories.title: Build pipeline, tests, and npm publish readiness
acceptanceCriteria: tsup builds successfully with zero errors
Built binary is executable: node dist/cli/index.js --help shows all commands
All unit tests pass (session discovery, path encoder, timer engine, adaptive engine, signal emitter, data purger)
All tests use tests/fixtures/mock-claude-home/ (no real ~/.claude/ dependency)
vitest runs with zero failures
npm pack creates a valid tarball; npm install -g from tarball makes 'adhd-dev' command available
TypeScript compiles with zero errors (npx tsc --noEmit)
